CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_content', false, 'bgIYhpjRuV8zbHJE_CfelwKpJ_Td6YuGJwixiek8lmI', 'v3.5.0--xDJYo5_FoobzGO-CaJ_DgVxmxEEAGXL9fuK2CgI3ZFQ', 'pmCOXEs-GPvJY2CEm0iHhPjW45kGARf-92uBdo3mzp0'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_content; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_content (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/1.getting-started/01.index.md', 'Introduction', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"Vuloom is a full-stack Vue framework built around a small set of conventions:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"app/"]," owns your document shell, page routes, middleware, and app-level data."],["li",{},["code",{},"server/routes/"]," owns raw HTTP handlers such as APIs, webhooks, and text responses."],["li",{},["code",{},"vuloom.config.ts"]," owns project-level configuration."],["li",{},["code",{},"vuloom prepare"]," generates ",["code",{},".vuloom/types/"]," so route ids, params, and middleware names stay typed."]],["p",{},"Vuloom is designed for teams that want file-based routing and SSR without losing direct control over Vue, Vite, and request handling."],["h2",{"id":"what-vuloom-includes"},"What Vuloom includes"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Document-level hydration with ",["code",{},"app/app.vue"],"."],["li",{},"File-based page routing under ",["code",{},"app/pages/"],"."],["li",{},"Route ",["code",{},"loader"]," and ",["code",{},"action"]," files."],["li",{},"Client navigation loading boundaries with ",["code",{},"loading.*"],"."],["li",{},"Raw server handlers with ",["code",{},"server/routes/**/*.ts"],"."],["li",{},"Typed navigation targets such as ",["code",{},"{ routeId, params }"],"."],["li",{},"App-level and route-level middleware with explicit ordering."]],["h2",{"id":"the-default-workflow"},"The default workflow"],["steps",{"level":"4"},["h4",{},"Create a project."],["h4",{},"Run ",["code",{},"vuloom prepare"]," to generate local route and middleware types."],["h4",{},"Run ",["code",{},"vuloom dev"]," during development."],["h4",{},"Run ",["code",{},"vuloom build"]," for production output."],["h4",{},"Run ",["code",{},"vuloom start"]," to serve the built app."]],["h2",{"id":"project-shape"},"Project shape"],["pre",{"className":["language-text"],"code":"├── app/\n│   ├── app.vue\n│   ├── app.config.ts\n│   ├── loader.ts\n│   ├── error.vue\n│   ├── middleware/\n│   ├── pages/\n├── server/\n│   ├── It must render:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"html"]],["li",{},["code",{},"head"]],["li",{},["code",{},"body"]]],["p",{},"That shell is what Horn server-renders and hydrates."],["h2",{"id":"route-views"},"Route views"],["p",{},"Route views live under ",["code",{},"app/pages/**"],":"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"layout.*"]," for nested layout nodes"],["li",{},["code",{},"page.*"]," for page components"],["li",{},["code",{},"error.*"]," for route-local error boundaries"],["li",{},["code",{},"loading.*"]," for client navigation loading UI"]],["h2",{"id":"mixed-view-styles"},"Mixed view styles"],["p",{},"You can mix styles in one app:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"/"]," can be a render-function page"],["li",{},["code",{},"/jsx"]," can be a TSX page"],["li",{},["code",{},"/sfc"]," can be a Vue SFC page"]],["p",{},"Horn treats them the same at routing and SSR time."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"document-shell","depth":2,"text":"Document shell"},{"id":"route-views","depth":2,"text":"Route views"},{"id":"mixed-view-styles","depth":2,"text":"Mixed view styles"}]},"icon":"lucide:panels-top-left"}', '', 'md', '{"icon":"lucide:panels-top-left"}', '{"icon":"lucide:panels-top-left"}', '/getting-started/views', '{"title":"Views","description":""}', '1.getting-started/04.views', 'tUaK61u3HxdmALW5d5khFOk43QNDsvA7-gVnH2A8qPI'); -- tUaK61u3HxdmALW5d5khFOk43QNDsvA7-gVnH2A8qPI

",["code",{},"app/pages/"],"."],["h2",{"id":"core-conventions"},"Core conventions"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"layout.*"]," creates a layout route"],["li",{},["code",{},"page.*"]," creates a page route"],["li",{},["code",{},"error.*"]," creates a route error boundary"],["li",{},["code",{},"loading.*"]," creates a client navigation loading boundary"],["li",{},["code",{},"middleware.ts"]," adds middleware for the current route"],["li",{},["code",{},"index/"]," is used for a directory''s own index route when that directory also has child routes"],["li",{},"a non-",["code",{},"index/"]," INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/1.getting-started/10.pending-ui.md', 'Pending UI', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"Horn exposes pending state through two mechanisms."],["h2",{"id":"loading"},["code",{},"loading.*"]],["p",{},["code",{},"app/pages/**/loading.*"]," renders while a client-side navigation is pending."],["ul",{},["li",{},"it does not render during the initial SSR request"],["li",{},"the nearest matched loading boundary wins"],["li",{},"layout loading keeps the layout shell and swaps the child subtree"],["li",{},"page loading swaps only the page node"]],["p",{},"Loading components receive:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"routeId"]],["li",{},["code",{},"location"]],["li",{},["code",{},"previousLocation"]],["li",{},["code",{},"action"]]],["h2",{"id":"usenavigation"},["code",{},"useNavigation()"]],["p",{},"Use ",["code",{},"useNavigation()"]," when you need state outside a loading boundary."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark github-dark","code":"const navigation =
